name: Baked Celery
recipeIngredient: 3 cups celery, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter or margarine in a saucepan.
2. Add all ingredients to the melted butter and combine well in an oven-safe casserole dish.
3. Cover the dish with foil or a lid.
4. Bake at 325°F (165°C) for 45 minutes, or until the celery is tender.
